array.string: set -euo pipefail; topo="${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/codex-stuck-detector-alpsinsurance-topology.jsonl"; jq -c 'select(.session=="alpsinsurance")' "$HOME/.local/state/flywheel/session-topology.jsonl" | jq -s -c 'group_by(.session) | map(max_by(.effective_at))[]' > "$topo"; jq -nc --arg ts "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" --arg session "alpsinsurance" --arg label "ai.zeststream.alps-codex-stuck-detector" '{schema_version:"codex-stuck-detector.launchd-fire.v1",event:"launchd_fire",ts:$ts,session:$session,label:$label}'; CODEX_STUCK_DETECTOR_TOPOLOGY="$topo" exec /Users/josh/Developer/flywheel/.flywheel/scripts/codex-template-stuck-detector.sh --session alpsinsurance --worker-panes-from-topology --apply --auto-recover --json
